revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: ''''猿田彦神社'''（さるたひこじんじゃ）は、[[サルタヒコ]]を祀っている[[神社]]。全国の猿田彦神社の総本社は[[三重県]]...'
整理
revision.text:
'''猿田彦神社'''（さるたひこじんじゃ）は、[[猿田彦神]]を祀る[[神社]]。なお、[[三重県]][[鈴鹿市]]の[[椿大神社]]は猿田彦大本宮を称し、全国猿田彦神社の総本社であると唱えている。
* [[猿田彦神社 (日光市)]] - [[栃木県]][[日光市]]鎮座 * [[猿田彦神社 (荒川区)]] - [[東京都]][[荒川区]]鎮座 * [[猿田彦神社 (掛川市山崎)]] - [[静岡県]][[掛川市]]鎮座 * [[猿田彦神社|猿田彦神社 (伊勢市)]] - [[三重県]][[伊勢市]]鎮座。
{{曖昧さ回避}}
{{デフォルトソート:さるたひこしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

== 概要 == 全国にあり、[[三重県]][[鈴鹿市]]の[[椿大神社]]が「猿田彦大本宮」として総本社であると称している。
== 一覧 == === 関東地方 === * [[神々森猿田彦神社]] （[[東京都]][[荒川区]]） * [[太道教猿田彦神社]] （東京都[[杉並区]][[阿佐谷南]]） * [[猿田彦神社 (杉並区)]] （東京都杉並区[[本天沼]]・[[本天沼稲荷神社]][[摂末社|境外摂社]]） * [[猿田彦神社 (千代田区)]] （東京都[[千代田区]]・[[日枝神社_(千代田区)|日枝神社]][[摂末社|境内摂社]]） * [[巣鴨猿田彦庚申堂]] （東京都[[豊島区]][[巣鴨]]） * [[猿田彦神社庚申堂]] （[[千葉県]][[船橋市]]） * [[猿田彦大神 (成田市)|猿田彦大神]] （千葉県[[成田市]]） * [[猿田神社]] （千葉県[[銚子市]]） * [[猿田彦神社 (日光市)|猿田彦神社]] （[[栃木県]][[日光市]]）
=== 中部地方 === * [[猿田彦社 (佐久市)]]（[[長野県]][[佐久市]]岩村田） * [[猿田彦神社 (掛川市高瀬)|猿田彦神社]] （[[静岡県]][[掛川市]]） * [[尾張猿田彦神社]] （[[愛知県]][[一宮市]]） * [[三光稲荷神社 (犬山市)|犬山猿田彦神社]] （愛知県[[犬山市]]） * [[猿田彦神社 (福井市)]]
=== 近畿地方 === * [[猿田彦神社]] （[[三重県]][[伊勢市]]） * [[猿田彦神社 (京都市上京区)]] （[[京都府]][[京都市]][[上京区]]） * [[猿田彦神社 (京都市右京区)]] （山之内庚申） （京都府京都市[[右京区]]） * [[猿田彦神社 (奈良市)]] （道祖神社） （[[奈良県]][[奈良市]]）
=== 九州地方 === * [[猿田彦神社 (福岡市)]] （[[福岡県]][[福岡市]][[早良区]]） * [[庚申社]]（福岡県[[直方市]]）
== 関連項目 == * [[庚申信仰]] * [[都波岐神社・奈加等神社]] * [[白鬚神社]] * [[白髭神社]]
{{曖昧さ回避}}
{{デフォルトソート:さるたひこしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

'''Sarutahiko Shrine''' (猿田彦神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} dedicated to {{ill|Sarutahiko Ōkami|ja|サルタヒコ}}, enshrined under this name. Such shrines are found throughout Japan, with {{ill|Tsubaki Grand Shrine|ja|椿大神社}} in {{ill|Suzuka, Mie|ja|鈴鹿市}} claiming to be the "Sarutahiko Grand Shrine Headquarters."
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Kamigamimori Sarutahiko Shrine|ja|神々森猿田彦神社}} ({{ill|Arakawa, Tokyo|ja|荒川区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}) * {{ill|Taidōkyō Sarutahiko Shrine|ja|太道教猿田彦神社}} (Asagaya Minami, {{ill|Suginami|ja|杉並区}}, Tokyo) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Suginami)|ja|猿田彦神社 (杉並区)}} (Mototenuma, Suginami, Tokyo; an external subordinate shrine of {{ill|Mototenuma Inari Shrine|ja|本天沼稲荷神社}}) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Chiyoda)|ja|猿田彦神社 (千代田区)}} (Chiyoda, Tokyo; a subordinate shrine of {{ill|Hie Shrine (Chiyoda)|ja|日枝神社}}) * {{ill|Sugamo Sarutahiko Kōshindō|ja|巣鴨猿田彦庚申堂}} (Sugamo, {{ill|Toshima, Tokyo|ja|豊島区}}, Tokyo) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine Kōshindō|ja|猿田彦神社庚申堂}} ({{ill|Funabashi|ja|船橋市}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|ja|千葉県}}) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Ōkami (Narita)|ja|猿田彦大神 (成田市)}} ({{ill|Narita|ja|成田市}}, Chiba Prefecture) * {{ill|Saruta Shrine|ja|猿田神社}} ({{ill|Chōshi|ja|銚子市}}, Chiba Prefecture) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Nikkō)|ja|猿田彦神社 (日光市)}} ({{ill|Nikkō|ja|日光市}}, {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|ja|栃木県}})
== Chūbu Region == * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Saku)|ja|猿田彦社 (佐久市)}} ({{ill|Saku|ja|佐久市}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Kakegawa)|ja|猿田彦神社 (掛川市高瀬)}} ({{ill|Kakegawa|ja|掛川市}}, {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|ja|静岡県}}) * {{ill|Owari Sarutahiko Shrine|ja|尾張猿田彦神社}} ({{ill|Ichinomiya|ja|一宮市}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}) * {{ill|Inuyama Sarutahiko Shrine|ja|三光稲荷神社 (犬山市)}} ({{ill|Inuyama|ja|犬山市}}, Aichi Prefecture) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Fukui)|ja|猿田彦神社 (福井市)}} ({{ill|Fukui City|ja|福井市}}, {{ill|Fukui Prefecture|ja|福井県}})
== Kansai Region == * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Ise)|ja|猿田彦神社}} ({{ill|Ise|ja|伊勢市}}, {{ill|Mie Prefecture|ja|三重県}}) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Kyoto, Kamigyō Ward)|ja|猿田彦神社 (京都市上京区)}} ({{ill|Kyoto City|ja|京都市}}, {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|ja|京都府}}) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Kyoto, Ukyō Ward)|ja|猿田彦神社 (京都市右京区)}} (Yamanochi Kōshin, Ukyō Ward, Kyoto City) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Nara)|ja|猿田彦神社 (奈良市)}} (Dōso Shrine, {{ill|Nara|ja|奈良市}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}})

Such shrines are found throughout Japan, with {{ill|Tsubaki Grand Shrine|ja|椿大神社}} in {{ill|Suzuka, Mie|ja|鈴鹿市}} claiming to be the "Sarutahiko Grand Shrine Headquarters."

revision.comment: 見出しの変更。表記の統一。住所の重複の削除。町名の追加。
revision.text:
'''猿田彦神社'''（さるたひこじんじゃ）は、猿田彦（[[サルタヒコ]]）を祭神として社名に持つ[[神社]]。
全国にあり、[[椿大神社]]（三重県鈴鹿市）が「猿田彦大本宮」として総本社であると称している。
== 主な猿田彦神社 ==
=== 関東地方 === * [[猿田彦神社 (日光市)|猿田彦神社]] （[[栃木県]][[日光市]]足尾町） * [[神々森猿田彦神社]] （[[東京都]][[荒川区]][[東日暮里]]） * [[太道教猿田彦神社]] （東京都[[杉並区]][[阿佐谷南]]） * [[猿田彦神社 (杉並区)|猿田彦神社]] （東京都杉並区[[本天沼]]） - [[本天沼稲荷神社]]境外社 * [[猿田彦神社 (千代田区)|猿田彦神社]] （東京都[[千代田区]][[永田町]]） - [[日枝神社_(千代田区)|日枝神社]]境内社 * [[巣鴨猿田彦大神庚申堂]] （東京都[[豊島区]][[巣鴨]]） * [[猿田彦神社庚申堂]] （[[千葉県]][[船橋市]][[本町 (船橋市)|本町]]） * [[猿田彦神社 (成田市)|猿田彦神社]] （千葉県[[成田市]]台方） - [[麻賀多神社]]境内社 * [[猿田神社]] （千葉県[[銚子市]]猿田町）
=== 中部地方 === * [[猿田彦社 (佐久市)|猿田彦社]] （[[長野県]][[佐久市]]岩村田） * [[猿田彦神社 (東御市)|猿田彦神社]] （[[長野県]][[東御市]]羽毛山） * [[猿田彦神社 (掛川市高瀬)|猿田彦神社]] （[[静岡県]][[掛川市]]高瀬） * [[尾張猿田彦神社]] （[[愛知県]][[一宮市]][[奥町]]） * [[犬山猿田彦神社]] （愛知県[[犬山市]]北古券） - [[三光稲荷神社 (犬山市)|三光稲荷神社]]境内社 * [[猿田彦神社 (福井市)|猿田彦神社]] （[[福井県]][[福井市]]冬野町）
=== 近畿地方 === * [[猿田彦神社]] （[[三重県]][[伊勢市]]宇治浦田） * [[猿田彦神社 (京都市上京区)|猿田彦神社]] （[[京都府]][[京都市]][[上京区]]上御霊前町） * [[猿田彦神社 (京都市右京区)|猿田彦神社]] （京都府京都市[[右京区]]山ノ内荒木町） - 山ノ内庚申 * [[猿田彦神社 (奈良市)|猿田彦神社]] （[[奈良県]][[奈良市]]） - 道祖神社
=== 九州地方 === * [[猿田彦神社 (福岡市)|猿田彦神社]] （[[福岡県]][[福岡市]][[早良区]][[藤崎 (福岡市)|藤崎]]）
== 関連項目 == * [[サルタヒコ]] * [[庚申信仰]] * [[都波岐神社・奈加等神社]]（三重県鈴鹿市） * [[庚申社]]（福岡県直方市） * [[白鬚神社 (曖昧さ回避)|白鬚神社]]
{{曖昧さ回避}}
{{デフォルトソート:さるたひこしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

revision.comment: 奈良市に今御門町を追加。

全国にあり、[[椿大神社]]（三重県鈴鹿市）が「猿田彦大本宮」として総本社であると称している。
== 主な猿田彦神社 ==
=== 関東地方 === * [[猿田彦神社 (日光市)|猿田彦神社]] （[[栃木県]][[日光市]]足尾町） * [[神々森猿田彦神社]] （[[東京都]][[荒川区]][[東日暮里]]） * [[太道教猿田彦神社]] （東京都[[杉並区]][[阿佐谷南]]） * [[猿田彦神社 (杉並区)|猿田彦神社]] （東京都杉並区[[本天沼]]） - [[本天沼稲荷神社]]境外社 * [[猿田彦神社 (千代田区)|猿田彦神社]] （東京都[[千代田区]][[永田町]]） - [[日枝神社_(千代田区)|日枝神社]]境内社 * [[巣鴨猿田彦大神庚申堂]] （東京都[[豊島区]][[巣鴨]]） * [[猿田彦神社庚申堂]] （[[千葉県]][[船橋市]][[本町 (船橋市)|本町]]） * [[猿田彦神社 (成田市)|猿田彦神社]] （千葉県[[成田市]]台方） - [[麻賀多神社]]境内社 * [[猿田神社]] （千葉県[[銚子市]]猿田町）
=== 中部地方 === * [[猿田彦社 (佐久市)|猿田彦社]] （[[長野県]][[佐久市]]岩村田） * [[猿田彦神社 (東御市)|猿田彦神社]] （[[長野県]][[東御市]]羽毛山） * [[猿田彦神社 (掛川市高瀬)|猿田彦神社]] （[[静岡県]][[掛川市]]高瀬） * [[尾張猿田彦神社]] （[[愛知県]][[一宮市]][[奥町]]） * [[犬山猿田彦神社]] （愛知県[[犬山市]]北古券） - [[三光稲荷神社 (犬山市)|三光稲荷神社]]境内社 * [[猿田彦神社 (福井市)|猿田彦神社]] （[[福井県]][[福井市]]冬野町）
=== 近畿地方 === * [[猿田彦神社]] （[[三重県]][[伊勢市]]宇治浦田） * [[猿田彦神社 (京都市上京区)|猿田彦神社]] （[[京都府]][[京都市]][[上京区]]上御霊前町） * [[猿田彦神社 (京都市右京区)|猿田彦神社]] （京都府京都市[[右京区]]山ノ内荒木町） - 山ノ内庚申 * [[猿田彦神社 (奈良市)|猿田彦神社]] （[[奈良県]][[奈良市]]今御門町） - 道祖神社
=== 九州地方 === * [[猿田彦神社 (福岡市)|猿田彦神社]] （[[福岡県]][[福岡市]][[早良区]][[藤崎 (福岡市)|藤崎]]）
== 関連項目 == * [[サルタヒコ]] * [[庚申信仰]] * [[都波岐神社・奈加等神社]]（三重県鈴鹿市） * [[庚申社]]（福岡県直方市） * [[白鬚神社 (曖昧さ回避)|白鬚神社]]
{{曖昧さ回避}}
{{デフォルトソート:さるたひこしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

revision.text:
'''Sarutahiko Shrine''' (猿田彦神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} dedicated to {{ill|Sarutahiko Ōkami|ja|サルタヒコ}}, enshrined under this name. Such shrines are found throughout Japan, with {{ill|Tsubaki Grand Shrine|ja|椿大神社}} in {{ill|Suzuka, Mie|ja|鈴鹿市}} claiming to be the "Sarutahiko Grand Shrine Headquarters."
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Kamigamimori Sarutahiko Shrine|ja|神々森猿田彦神社}} ({{ill|Arakawa, Tokyo|ja|荒川区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}) * {{ill|Taidōkyō Sarutahiko Shrine|ja|太道教猿田彦神社}} (Asagaya Minami, {{ill|Suginami|ja|杉並区}}, Tokyo) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Suginami)|ja|猿田彦神社 (杉並区)}} (Mototenuma, Suginami, Tokyo; an external subordinate shrine of {{ill|Mototenuma Inari Shrine|ja|本天沼稲荷神社}}) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Chiyoda)|ja|猿田彦神社 (千代田区)}} (Chiyoda, Tokyo; a subordinate shrine of {{ill|Hie Shrine (Chiyoda)|ja|日枝神社}}) * {{ill|Sugamo Sarutahiko Kōshindō|ja|巣鴨猿田彦庚申堂}} (Sugamo, {{ill|Toshima, Tokyo|ja|豊島区}}, Tokyo) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine Kōshindō|ja|猿田彦神社庚申堂}} ({{ill|Funabashi|ja|船橋市}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|ja|千葉県}}) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Ōkami (Narita)|ja|猿田彦大神 (成田市)}} ({{ill|Narita|ja|成田市}}, Chiba Prefecture) * {{ill|Saruta Shrine|ja|猿田神社}} ({{ill|Chōshi|ja|銚子市}}, Chiba Prefecture) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Nikkō)|ja|猿田彦神社 (日光市)}} ({{ill|Nikkō|ja|日光市}}, {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|ja|栃木県}})
== Chūbu Region == * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Saku)|ja|猿田彦社 (佐久市)}} ({{ill|Saku|ja|佐久市}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Kakegawa)|ja|猿田彦神社 (掛川市高瀬)}} ({{ill|Kakegawa|ja|掛川市}}, {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|ja|静岡県}}) * {{ill|Owari Sarutahiko Shrine|ja|尾張猿田彦神社}} ({{ill|Ichinomiya|ja|一宮市}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}) * {{ill|Inuyama Sarutahiko Shrine|ja|三光稲荷神社 (犬山市)}} ({{ill|Inuyama|ja|犬山市}}, Aichi Prefecture) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Fukui)|ja|猿田彦神社 (福井市)}} ({{ill|Fukui City|ja|福井市}}, {{ill|Fukui Prefecture|ja|福井県}})
== Kansai Region == * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Ise)|ja|猿田彦神社}} ({{ill|Ise|ja|伊勢市}}, {{ill|Mie Prefecture|ja|三重県}}) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Kyoto, Kamigyō Ward)|ja|猿田彦神社 (京都市上京区)}} ({{ill|Kyoto City|ja|京都市}}, {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|ja|京都府}}) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Kyoto, Ukyō Ward)|ja|猿田彦神社 (京都市右京区)}} (Yamanochi Kōshin, Ukyō Ward, Kyoto City) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Nara)|ja|猿田彦神社 (奈良市)}} (Dōso Shrine, {{ill|Nara|ja|奈良市}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}})
== Kyūshū Region == * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Fukuoka City)|ja|猿田彦神社 (福岡市)}} ({{ill|Fukuoka City|ja|福岡市}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}}) * {{ill|Kōshinsha|ja|庚申社}} ({{ill|Nōgata|ja|直方市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture)
== Related Topics == * {{ill|Kōshin belief|ja|庚申信仰}} * {{ill|Tsuwa Hime Shrine and Naka Shrine|ja|都波岐神社・奈加等神社}} * {{ill|Shirahige Shrine|ja|白鬚神社}} * {{ill|Shirabe Shrine|ja|白髭神社}}

'''Sarutahiko Shrine''' (猿田彦神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} dedicated to {{ill|Sarutahiko Ōkami|ja|サルタヒコ}}, enshrined under this name. Such shrines are found throughout Japan, with {{ill|Tsubaki Grand Shrine|ja|椿大神社}} in {{ill|Suzuka, Mie|ja|鈴鹿市}} claiming to be the "Sarutahiko Grand Shrine Headquarters."

'''Sarutahiko Shrine''' (猿田彦神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} dedicated to {{ill|Sarutahiko Ōkami|ja|サルタヒコ}}, enshrined under this name. Such shrines are found throughout Japan, with {{ill|Tsubaki Grand Shrine|ja|椿大神社}} in {{ill|Suzuka, Mie|ja|鈴鹿市}} claiming to be the "Sarutahiko Grand Shrine Headquarters."
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Kamigamimori Sarutahiko Shrine|ja|神々森猿田彦神社}} ({{ill|Arakawa, Tokyo|ja|荒川区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}) * {{ill|Taidōkyō Sarutahiko Shrine|ja|太道教猿田彦神社}} (Asagaya Minami, {{ill|Suginami|ja|杉並区}}, Tokyo) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Suginami)|ja|猿田彦神社 (杉並区)}} (Mototenuma, Suginami, Tokyo; an external subordinate shrine of {{ill|Mototenuma Inari Shrine|ja|本天沼稲荷神社}}) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Chiyoda)|ja|猿田彦神社 (千代田区)}} (Chiyoda, Tokyo; a subordinate shrine of {{ill|Hie Shrine (Chiyoda)|ja|日枝神社}}) * {{ill|Sugamo Sarutahiko Kōshindō|ja|巣鴨猿田彦Kōshin-dō}} (Sugamo, {{ill|Toshima, Tokyo|ja|豊島区}}, Tokyo) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine Kōshindō|ja|猿田彦神社Kōshin-dō}} ({{ill|Funabashi|ja|船橋市}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|ja|千葉県}}) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Ōkami (Narita)|ja|猿田彦大神 (成田市)}} ({{ill|Narita|ja|成田市}}, Chiba Prefecture) * {{ill|Saruta Shrine|ja|猿田神社}} ({{ill|Chōshi|ja|銚子市}}, Chiba Prefecture) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Nikkō)|ja|猿田彦神社 (日光市)}} ({{ill|Nikkō|ja|日光市}}, {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|ja|栃木県}})
== Chūbu Region == * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Saku)|ja|猿田彦社 (佐久市)}} ({{ill|Saku|ja|佐久市}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Kakegawa)|ja|猿田彦神社 (掛川市高瀬)}} ({{ill|Kakegawa|ja|掛川市}}, {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|ja|静岡県}}) * {{ill|Owari Sarutahiko Shrine|ja|尾張猿田彦神社}} ({{ill|Ichinomiya|ja|一宮市}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}) * {{ill|Inuyama Sarutahiko Shrine|ja|三光稲荷神社 (犬山市)}} ({{ill|Inuyama|ja|犬山市}}, Aichi Prefecture) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Fukui)|ja|猿田彦神社 (福井市)}} ({{ill|Fukui City|ja|福井市}}, {{ill|Fukui Prefecture|ja|福井県}})
== Kansai Region == * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine|ja|猿田彦神社}} ({{ill|Ise|ja|伊勢市}}, {{ill|Mie Prefecture|ja|三重県}}) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Kyoto, Kamigyō Ward)|ja|猿田彦神社 (京都市上京区)}} ({{ill|Kyoto City|ja|京都市}}, {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|ja|京都府}}) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Kyoto, Ukyō Ward)|ja|猿田彦神社 (京都市右京区)}} (Yamanochi Kōshin, Ukyō Ward, Kyoto City) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Nara)|ja|猿田彦神社 (奈良市)}} (Dōso Shrine, {{ill|Nara|ja|奈良市}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}})
== Kyūshū Region == * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Fukuoka City)|ja|猿田彦神社 (福岡市)}} ({{ill|Fukuoka City|ja|福岡市}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}}) * {{ill|Kōshinsha|ja|庚申社}} ({{ill|Nōgata|ja|直方市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture)
== See Also == * {{ill|Kōshin belief|ja|庚申信仰}} * {{ill|Tsuwa Hime Shrine and Naka Shrine|ja|都波岐神社・奈加等神社}} * {{ill|Shirahige Shrine|ja|白鬚神社}} * {{ill|Shirabe Shrine|ja|白髭神社}}
{{Aimai}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Sarutahiko Shrine}} [[Category:disambiguation pages requiring recategorization]] [[Category:disambiguation pages requiring recategorization]][[Category:disambiguation pages requiring recategorization]] [[Category:disambiguation pages requiring recategorization]][[simple:user:immanuelle/Sarutahiko Shrines]][[Category:shrine disambiguations]][[Category:disambiguation pages requiring recategorization]][[Category:disambiguation pages requiring recategorization]] [[Category:disambiguation pages requiring recategorization]][[Category:disambiguation pages requiring recategorization]] [[Category:disambiguation pages requiring recategorization]][[Category:disambiguation pages requiring recategorization]][[Category:disambiguation pages requiring recategorization]] <!--note do not remove this category during translation--> [[ja:猿田彦神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] [[Category:disambiguation pages requiring recategorization]] [[Category:bump February 13, 2025 bump]][[en:Sarutahiko Shrines]][[Category:shrine disambiguations]][[Category:bump February 13, 2025 bump]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:Sarutahiko Shrines]][[Category:shrine disambiguations]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Sarutahiko Shrines]][[Category:shrine disambiguations]] [[Category:Sarutahiko Shrine (disambiguation) forks]][[Category:Sarutahiko Shrine (disambiguation)]] [[Category:Sarutahiko Shrine (disambiguation) forks]][[Category:Unsorted disambiguation pages]]<!--Sarutahiko Shrine (disambiguation)-->[[Category:Unsorted disambiguation pages]]<!--Sarutahiko Shrine (disambiguation)-->[[Category:All disambiguation pages]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Sarutahiko Shrine (disambiguation)]][[Category:qq]]

revision.text:
'''Sarutahiko Shrine''' (猿田彦神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} dedicated to {{ill|Sarutahiko Ōkami|ja|サルタヒコ}}, enshrined under this name. Such shrines are found throughout Japan, with {{ill|Tsubaki Grand Shrine|ja|椿大神社}} in {{ill|Suzuka, Mie|ja|鈴鹿市}} claiming to be the "Sarutahiko Grand Shrine Headquarters."
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Kamigamimori Sarutahiko Shrine|ja|神々森猿田彦神社}} ({{ill|Arakawa, Tokyo|ja|荒川区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}) * {{ill|Taidōkyō Sarutahiko Shrine|ja|太道教猿田彦神社}} (Asagaya Minami, {{ill|Suginami|ja|杉並区}}, Tokyo) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Suginami)|ja|猿田彦神社 (杉並区)}} (Mototenuma, Suginami, Tokyo; an external subordinate shrine of {{ill|Mototenuma Inari Shrine|ja|本天沼稲荷神社}}) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Chiyoda)|ja|猿田彦神社 (千代田区)}} (Chiyoda, Tokyo; a subordinate shrine of {{ill|Hie Shrine (Chiyoda)|ja|日枝神社}}) * {{ill|Sugamo Sarutahiko Kōshindō|ja|巣鴨猿田彦Kōshin-dō}} (Sugamo, {{ill|Toshima, Tokyo|ja|豊島区}}, Tokyo) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine Kōshindō|ja|猿田彦神社Kōshin-dō}} ({{ill|Funabashi|ja|船橋市}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|ja|千葉県}}) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Ōkami (Narita)|ja|猿田彦大神 (成田市)}} ({{ill|Narita|ja|成田市}}, Chiba Prefecture) * {{ill|Saruta Shrine|ja|猿田神社}} ({{ill|Chōshi|ja|銚子市}}, Chiba Prefecture) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Nikkō)|ja|猿田彦神社 (日光市)}} ({{ill|Nikkō|ja|日光市}}, {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|ja|栃木県}})
== Chūbu Region == * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Saku)|ja|猿田彦社 (佐久市)}} ({{ill|Saku|ja|佐久市}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Kakegawa)|ja|猿田彦神社 (掛川市高瀬)}} ({{ill|Kakegawa|ja|掛川市}}, {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|ja|静岡県}}) * {{ill|Owari Sarutahiko Shrine|ja|尾張猿田彦神社}} ({{ill|Ichinomiya|ja|一宮市}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}) * {{ill|Inuyama Sarutahiko Shrine|ja|三光稲荷神社 (犬山市)}} ({{ill|Inuyama|ja|犬山市}}, Aichi Prefecture) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Fukui)|ja|猿田彦神社 (福井市)}} ({{ill|Fukui City|ja|福井市}}, {{ill|Fukui Prefecture|ja|福井県}})
== Kansai Region == * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine|ja|猿田彦神社}} ({{ill|Ise|ja|伊勢市}}, {{ill|Mie Prefecture|ja|三重県}}) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Kyoto, Kamigyō Ward)|ja|猿田彦神社 (京都市上京区)}} ({{ill|Kyoto City|ja|京都市}}, {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|ja|京都府}}) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Kyoto, Ukyō Ward)|ja|猿田彦神社 (京都市右京区)}} (Yamanochi Kōshin, Ukyō Ward, Kyoto City) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Nara)|ja|猿田彦神社 (奈良市)}} (Dōso Shrine, {{ill|Nara|ja|奈良市}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}})
== Kyūshū Region == * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Fukuoka City)|ja|猿田彦神社 (福岡市)}} ({{ill|Fukuoka City|ja|福岡市}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}}) * {{ill|Kōshinsha|ja|庚申社}} ({{ill|Nōgata|ja|直方市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture)
== See Also == * {{ill|Kōshin belief|ja|庚申信仰}} * {{ill|Tsuwa Hime Shrine and Naka Shrine|ja|都波岐神社・奈加等神社}} * {{ill|Shirahige Shrine|ja|白鬚神社}} * {{ill|Shirabe Shrine|ja|白髭神社}}

Such shrines are found throughout Japan, with {{ill|Tsubaki Grand Shrine|ja|椿大神社}} in {{ill|Suzuka, Mie|ja|鈴鹿市}} claiming to be the "Sarutahiko Grand Shrine Headquarters."

'''Sarutahiko Shrine''' (猿田彦神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|12=draft}} dedicated to {{ill|Sarutahiko Ōkami|ja|サルタヒコ|12=draft}}, enshrined under this name. Such shrines are found throughout Japan, with {{ill|Tsubaki Grand Shrine|ja|椿大神社|12=draft}} in {{ill|Suzuka, Mie|ja|鈴鹿市|12=draft}} claiming to be the "Sarutahiko Grand Shrine Headquarters."

revision.text:
'''猿田彦神社'''（さるたひこじんじゃ）は、猿田彦（[[サルタヒコ]]）を祭神として社名に持つ[[神社]]。
全国にあり、[[椿大神社]]（三重県鈴鹿市）が「猿田彦大本宮」として総本社であると称している。
== 主な猿田彦神社 ==
=== 関東地方 === * [[猿田彦神社 (日光市)|猿田彦神社]] （[[栃木県]][[日光市]]足尾町） * [[神々森猿田彦神社]] （[[東京都]][[荒川区]][[東日暮里]]） * [[太道教猿田彦神社]] （東京都[[杉並区]][[阿佐谷南]]） * [[猿田彦神社 (杉並区)|猿田彦神社]] （東京都杉並区[[本天沼]]） - [[本天沼稲荷神社]]境外社 * [[猿田彦神社 (千代田区)|猿田彦神社]] （東京都[[千代田区]][[永田町]]） - [[日枝神社_(千代田区)|日枝神社]]境内社 * [[巣鴨猿田彦大神庚申堂]] （東京都[[豊島区]][[巣鴨]]） * [[猿田彦神社庚申堂]] （[[千葉県]][[船橋市]][[本町 (船橋市)|本町]]） * [[猿田彦神社 (成田市)|猿田彦神社]] （千葉県[[成田市]]台方） - [[麻賀多神社]]境内社 * [[猿田神社]] （千葉県[[銚子市]]猿田町）
=== 中部地方 === * [[猿田彦社 (佐久市)|猿田彦社]] （[[長野県]][[佐久市]]岩村田） * [[猿田彦神社 (東御市)|猿田彦神社]] （[[長野県]][[東御市]]羽毛山） * [[猿田彦神社 (掛川市高瀬)|猿田彦神社]] （[[静岡県]][[掛川市]]高瀬） * [[尾張猿田彦神社]] （[[愛知県]][[一宮市]][[奥町]]） * [[犬山猿田彦神社]] （愛知県[[犬山市]]北古券） - [[三光稲荷神社 (犬山市)|三光稲荷神社]]境内社 * [[猿田彦神社 (福井市)|猿田彦神社]] （[[福井県]][[福井市]]冬野町）
=== 近畿地方 === * [[猿田彦神社]] （[[三重県]][[伊勢市]]宇治浦田） * [[猿田彦神社 (京都市上京区)|猿田彦神社]] （[[京都府]][[京都市]][[上京区]]上御霊前町） * [[猿田彦神社 (京都市右京区)|猿田彦神社]] （京都府京都市[[右京区]]山ノ内荒木町） - 山ノ内庚申 * [[猿田彦神社 (奈良市)|猿田彦神社]] （[[奈良県]][[奈良市]]今御門町） - 道祖神社
=== 九州地方 === * [[猿田彦神社 (福岡市)|猿田彦神社]] （[[福岡県]][[福岡市]][[早良区]][[藤崎 (福岡市)|藤崎]]）
== 関連項目 == * [[サルタヒコ]] * [[庚申信仰]] * [[都波岐神社・奈加等神社]]（三重県鈴鹿市） * [[庚申社]]（福岡県直方市） * [[白鬚神社 (曖昧さ回避)|白鬚神社]]
{{曖昧さ回避}}
{{デフォルトソート:さるたひこしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

=== 近畿地方 === * [[猿田彦神社]] （[[三重県]][[伊勢市]]宇治浦田） * [[猿田彦神社 (京都市上京区)|猿田彦神社]] （[[京都府]][[京都市]][[上京区]]上御霊前町） * [[猿田彦神社 (京都市右京区)|猿田彦神社]] （京都府京都市[[右京区]]山ノ内荒木町） - 山ノ内庚申 * [[猿田彦神社 (奈良市)|猿田彦神社]] （[[奈良県]][[奈良市]]今御門町） - 道祖神社

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:猿田彦神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11572142]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Sarutahiko Shrine''' (猿田彦神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] dedicated to [[:en:Sarutahiko Ōkami|Sarutahiko Ōkami]], enshrined under this name. Such shrines are found throughout Japan, with [[:en:Tsubaki Grand Shrine|Tsubaki Grand Shrine]] in [[:en:Suzuka, Mie|Suzuka, Mie]] claiming to be the "Sarutahiko Grand Shrine Headquarters."

an external subordinate shrine of {{ill|Mototenuma Inari Shrine|ja|本天沼稲荷神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mototenuma Inari Shrine|qq=|1=Hon-Amanuma Inari Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11520104}}) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Chiyoda)|ja|猿田彦神社 (千代田区)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarutahiko Shrine (Chiyoda)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Chiyoda, Tokyo; revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:猿田彦神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11572142]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Sarutahiko Shrine''' (猿田彦神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] dedicated to [[:en:Sarutahiko Ōkami|Sarutahiko Ōkami]], enshrined under this name. Such shrines are found throughout Japan, with [[:en:Tsubaki Grand Shrine|Tsubaki Grand Shrine]] in [[:en:Suzuka, Mie|Suzuka, Mie]] claiming to be the "Sarutahiko Grand Shrine Headquarters."
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Kamigamimori Sarutahiko Shrine|ja|神々森猿田彦神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamigamimori Sarutahiko Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ([[:en:Arakawa, Tokyo|Arakawa, Tokyo]], [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]]) * {{ill|Taidōkyō Sarutahiko Shrine|ja|太道教猿田彦神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taidōkyō Sarutahiko Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Asagaya Minami, [[:en:Suginami|Suginami]], Tokyo) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Suginami)|ja|猿田彦神社 (杉並区)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarutahiko Shrine (Suginami)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Mototenuma, Suginami, Tokyo; an external subordinate shrine of {{ill|Mototenuma Inari Shrine|ja|本天沼稲荷神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mototenuma Inari Shrine|qq=|1=Hon-Amanuma Inari Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11520104}}) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Chiyoda)|ja|猿田彦神社 (千代田区)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarutahiko Shrine (Chiyoda)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Chiyoda, Tokyo; <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:猿田彦神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11572142]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Sarutahiko Shrine''' (猿田彦神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] dedicated to [[:en:Sarutahiko Ōkami|Sarutahiko Ōkami]], enshrined under this name. Such shrines are found throughout Japan, with [[:en:Tsubaki Grand Shrine|Tsubaki Grand Shrine]] in [[:en:Suzuka, Mie|Suzuka, Mie]] claiming to be the "Sarutahiko Grand Shrine Headquarters."
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Kamigamimori Sarutahiko Shrine|ja|神々森猿田彦神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamigamimori Sarutahiko Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ([[:en:Arakawa, Tokyo|Arakawa, Tokyo]], [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]]) * {{ill|Taidōkyō Sarutahiko Shrine|ja|太道教猿田彦神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taidōkyō Sarutahiko Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Asagaya Minami, [[:en:Suginami|Suginami]], Tokyo) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Suginami)|ja|猿田彦神社 (杉並区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarutahiko Shrine (Suginami)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Mototenuma, Suginami, Tokyo; an external subordinate shrine of {{ill|Mototenuma Inari Shrine|ja|本天沼稲荷神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mototenuma Inari Shrine|1=Hon-Amanuma Inari Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11520104}}) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Chiyoda)|ja|猿田彦神社 (千代田区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarutahiko Shrine (Chiyoda)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Chiyoda, Tokyo; a subordinate shrine of {{ill|Hie Shrine (Chiyoda)|ja|日枝神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hie Shrine (Chiyoda)|1=Hie Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4189425}}) * {{ill|Sugamo Sarutahiko Kōshindō|ja|巣鴨猿田彦Kōshin-dō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugamo Sarutahiko Kōshindō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Sugamo, [[:en:Toshima|Toshima, Tokyo]], Tokyo) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine Kōshindō|ja|猿田彦神社Kōshin-dō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarutahiko Shrine Kōshindō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ([[:en:Funabashi|Funabashi]], [[:en:Chiba Prefecture|Chiba Prefecture]]) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Ōkami (Narita)|ja|猿田彦大神 (成田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarutahiko Ōkami (Narita)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ([[:en:Narita, Chiba|Narita]], Chiba Prefecture) * {{ill|Saruta Shrine|ja|猿田神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saruta Shrine|qq=}} ([[:en:Chōshi|Chōshi]], Chiba Prefecture) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Nikkō)|ja|猿田彦神社 (日光市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarutahiko Shrine (Nikkō)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ([[:en:Nikkō|Nikkō]], [[:en:Tochigi Prefecture|Tochigi Prefecture]])
== Chūbu Region == * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Saku)|ja|猿田彦社 (佐久市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarutahiko Shrine (Saku)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ([[:en:Saku, Nagano|Saku]], [[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]]) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Kakegawa)|ja|猿田彦神社 (掛川市高瀬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarutahiko Shrine (Kakegawa)|1=Sarutahiko Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q111665822}} ([[:en:Kakegawa, Shizuoka|Kakegawa]], [[:en:Shizuoka Prefecture|Shizuoka Prefecture]]) * {{ill|Owari Sarutahiko Shrine|ja|尾張猿田彦神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Owari Sarutahiko Shrine|1=Owari Sarutahiko Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11465316}} ([[:en:Ichinomiya, Aichi|Ichinomiya]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]) * {{ill|Inuyama Sarutahiko Shrine|ja|三光稲荷神社 (犬山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inuyama Sarutahiko Shrine|1=Sankō Inari Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11354441}} ([[:en:Inuyama, Aichi|Inuyama]], Aichi Prefecture) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Fukui)|ja|猿田彦神社 (福井市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarutahiko Shrine (Fukui)|qq=}} ([[:en:Fukui (city)|Fukui City]], [[:en:Fukui Prefecture|Fukui Prefecture]])

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:猿田彦神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11572142]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Sarutahiko Shrine''' (猿田彦神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] dedicated to [[:en:Sarutahiko Ōkami|Sarutahiko Ōkami]], enshrined under this name. Such shrines are found throughout Japan, with [[:en:Tsubaki Grand Shrine|Tsubaki Grand Shrine]] in [[:en:Suzuka, Mie|Suzuka, Mie]] claiming to be the "Sarutahiko Grand Shrine Headquarters."
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Kamigamimori Sarutahiko Shrine|ja|神々森猿田彦神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamigamimori Sarutahiko Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ([[:en:Arakawa, Tokyo|Arakawa, Tokyo]], [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]]) * {{ill|Taidōkyō Sarutahiko Shrine|ja|太道教猿田彦神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taidōkyō Sarutahiko Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Asagaya Minami, [[:en:Suginami|Suginami]], Tokyo) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Suginami)|ja|猿田彦神社 (杉並区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarutahiko Shrine (Suginami)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Mototenuma, Suginami, Tokyo; an external subordinate shrine of {{ill|Mototenuma Inari Shrine|ja|本天沼稲荷神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mototenuma Inari Shrine|1=Hon-Amanuma Inari Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11520104}}) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Chiyoda)|ja|猿田彦神社 (千代田区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarutahiko Shrine (Chiyoda)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Chiyoda, Tokyo; a subordinate shrine of {{ill|Hie Shrine (Chiyoda)|ja|日枝神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hie Shrine (Chiyoda)|1=Hie Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4189425}}) * {{ill|Sugamo Sarutahiko Kōshindō|ja|巣鴨猿田彦Kōshin-dō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugamo Sarutahiko Kōshindō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Sugamo, [[:en:Toshima|Toshima, Tokyo]], Tokyo) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine Kōshindō|ja|猿田彦神社Kōshin-dō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarutahiko Shrine Kōshindō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ([[:en:Funabashi|Funabashi]], [[:en:Chiba Prefecture|Chiba Prefecture]]) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Ōkami (Narita)|ja|猿田彦大神 (成田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarutahiko Ōkami (Narita)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ([[:en:Narita, Chiba|Narita]], Chiba Prefecture) * {{ill|Saruta Shrine|ja|猿田神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saruta Shrine|qq=}} ([[:en:Chōshi|Chōshi]], Chiba Prefecture) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Nikkō)|ja|猿田彦神社 (日光市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarutahiko Shrine (Nikkō)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ([[:en:Nikkō|Nikkō]], [[:en:Tochigi Prefecture|Tochigi Prefecture]])
== Chūbu Region == * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Saku)|ja|猿田彦社 (佐久市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarutahiko Shrine (Saku)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ([[:en:Saku, Nagano|Saku]], [[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]]) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Kakegawa)|ja|猿田彦神社 (掛川市高瀬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarutahiko Shrine (Kakegawa)|1=Sarutahiko Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q111665822}} ([[:en:Kakegawa, Shizuoka|Kakegawa]], [[:en:Shizuoka Prefecture|Shizuoka Prefecture]]) * {{ill|Owari Sarutahiko Shrine|ja|尾張猿田彦神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Owari Sarutahiko Shrine|1=Owari Sarutahiko Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11465316}} ([[:en:Ichinomiya, Aichi|Ichinomiya]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]) * {{ill|Inuyama Sarutahiko Shrine|ja|三光稲荷神社 (犬山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inuyama Sarutahiko Shrine|1=Sankō Inari Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11354441}} ([[:en:Inuyama, Aichi|Inuyama]], Aichi Prefecture) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Fukui)|ja|猿田彦神社 (福井市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarutahiko Shrine (Fukui)|qq=}} ([[:en:Fukui (city)|Fukui City]], [[:en:Fukui Prefecture|Fukui Prefecture]])
== Kansai Region == * [[:en:Sarutahiko Shrine|Sarutahiko Shrine]] ([[:en:Ise, Mie|Ise]], [[:en:Mie Prefecture|Mie Prefecture]]) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Kyoto, Kamigyō Ward)|ja|猿田彦神社 (京都市上京区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarutahiko Shrine (Kyoto, Kamigyō Ward)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ([[:en:Kyoto|Kyoto City]], [[:en:Kyoto Prefecture|Kyoto Prefecture]]) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Kyoto, Ukyō Ward)|ja|猿田彦神社 (京都市右京区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarutahiko Shrine (Kyoto, Ukyō Ward)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Yamanochi Kōshin, Ukyō Ward, Kyoto City) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Nara)|ja|猿田彦神社 (奈良市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarutahiko Shrine (Nara)|1=Sarutahiko Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q22118895}} (Dōso Shrine, [[:en:Nara (city)|Nara]], [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara Prefecture]])
== Kyūshū Region == * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Fukuoka City)|ja|猿田彦神社 (福岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarutahiko Shrine (Fukuoka City)|1=Sarutahiko Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q110992378}} ([[:en:Fukuoka|Fukuoka City]], [[:en:Fukuoka Prefecture|Fukuoka Prefecture]]) * {{ill|Kōshinsha|ja|庚申社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshinsha|1=Kōshin-sha (Nōgata, Fukuoka)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11486003}} ([[:en:Nōgata, Fukuoka|Nōgata]], Fukuoka Prefecture) == See Also == * [[:en:Kōshin|Kōshin belief]] * [[:en:Tsubaki Shrine|Tsuwa Hime Shrine and Naka Shrine]] * [[:en:Shirahige Shrine|Shirahige Shrine]] * {{ill|Shirabe Shrine|ja|白髭神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shirabe Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 白鬚神社 (曖昧さ回避)|1=Shirabe Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11580496}}

Such shrines are found throughout Japan, with [[:en:Tsubaki Grand Shrine|Tsubaki Grand Shrine]] in [[:en:Suzuka, Mie|Suzuka, Mie]] claiming to be the "Sarutahiko Grand Shrine Headquarters."

Such shrines are found throughout Japan, with [[:en:Tsubaki Grand Shrine|Tsubaki Grand Shrine]] in [[:en:Suzuka, Mie|Suzuka, Mie]] claiming to be the "Sarutahiko Grand Shrine Headquarters."

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:猿田彦神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:猿田彦神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:猿田彦神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11572142]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Sarutahiko Shrine''' (猿田彦神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] dedicated to [[:en:Sarutahiko Ōkami|Sarutahiko Ōkami]], enshrined under this name. Such shrines are found throughout Japan, with [[:en:Tsubaki Grand Shrine|Tsubaki Grand Shrine]] in [[:en:Suzuka, Mie|Suzuka, Mie]] claiming to be the "Sarutahiko Grand Shrine Headquarters."
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Kamigamimori Sarutahiko Shrine|ja|神々森猿田彦神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamigamimori Sarutahiko Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ([[:en:Arakawa, Tokyo|Arakawa, Tokyo]], [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]]) * {{ill|Taidōkyō Sarutahiko Shrine|ja|太道教猿田彦神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taidōkyō Sarutahiko Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Asagaya Minami, [[:en:Suginami|Suginami]], Tokyo) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Suginami)|ja|猿田彦神社 (杉並区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarutahiko Shrine (Suginami)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Mototenuma, Suginami, Tokyo; an external subordinate shrine of {{ill|Mototenuma Inari Shrine|ja|本天沼稲荷神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mototenuma Inari Shrine|1=Hon-Amanuma Inari Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11520104}}) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Chiyoda)|ja|猿田彦神社 (千代田区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarutahiko Shrine (Chiyoda)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Chiyoda, Tokyo; a subordinate shrine of {{ill|Hie Shrine (Chiyoda)|ja|日枝神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hie Shrine (Chiyoda)|1=Hie Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4189425}}) * {{ill|Sugamo Sarutahiko Kōshindō|ja|巣鴨猿田彦Kōshin-dō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugamo Sarutahiko Kōshindō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Sugamo, [[:en:Toshima|Toshima, Tokyo]], Tokyo) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine Kōshindō|ja|猿田彦神社Kōshin-dō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarutahiko Shrine Kōshindō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ([[:en:Funabashi|Funabashi]], [[:en:Chiba Prefecture|Chiba Prefecture]]) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Ōkami (Narita)|ja|猿田彦大神 (成田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarutahiko Ōkami (Narita)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ([[:en:Narita, Chiba|Narita]], Chiba Prefecture) * {{ill|Saruta Shrine|ja|猿田神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saruta Shrine|qq=}} ([[:en:Chōshi|Chōshi]], Chiba Prefecture) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Nikkō)|ja|猿田彦神社 (日光市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarutahiko Shrine (Nikkō)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ([[:en:Nikkō|Nikkō]], [[:en:Tochigi Prefecture|Tochigi Prefecture]])
== Chūbu Region == * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Saku)|ja|猿田彦社 (佐久市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarutahiko Shrine (Saku)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ([[:en:Saku, Nagano|Saku]], [[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]]) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Kakegawa)|ja|猿田彦神社 (掛川市高瀬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarutahiko Shrine (Kakegawa)|1=Sarutahiko Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q111665822}} ([[:en:Kakegawa, Shizuoka|Kakegawa]], [[:en:Shizuoka Prefecture|Shizuoka Prefecture]]) * {{ill|Owari Sarutahiko Shrine|ja|尾張猿田彦神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Owari Sarutahiko Shrine|1=Owari Sarutahiko Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11465316}} ([[:en:Ichinomiya, Aichi|Ichinomiya]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]) * {{ill|Inuyama Sarutahiko Shrine|ja|三光稲荷神社 (犬山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inuyama Sarutahiko Shrine|1=Sankō Inari Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11354441}} ([[:en:Inuyama, Aichi|Inuyama]], Aichi Prefecture) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Fukui)|ja|猿田彦神社 (福井市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarutahiko Shrine (Fukui)|qq=}} ([[:en:Fukui (city)|Fukui City]], [[:en:Fukui Prefecture|Fukui Prefecture]])
== Kansai Region == * [[:en:Sarutahiko Shrine|Sarutahiko Shrine]] ([[:en:Ise, Mie|Ise]], [[:en:Mie Prefecture|Mie Prefecture]]) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Kyoto, Kamigyō Ward)|ja|猿田彦神社 (京都市上京区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarutahiko Shrine (Kyoto, Kamigyō Ward)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ([[:en:Kyoto|Kyoto City]], [[:en:Kyoto Prefecture|Kyoto Prefecture]]) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Kyoto, Ukyō Ward)|ja|猿田彦神社 (京都市右京区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarutahiko Shrine (Kyoto, Ukyō Ward)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Yamanochi Kōshin, Ukyō Ward, Kyoto City) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Nara)|ja|猿田彦神社 (奈良市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarutahiko Shrine (Nara)|1=Sarutahiko Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q22118895}} (Dōso Shrine, [[:en:Nara (city)|Nara]], [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara Prefecture]])
== Kyūshū Region == * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Fukuoka City)|ja|猿田彦神社 (福岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarutahiko Shrine (Fukuoka City)|1=Sarutahiko Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q110992378}} ([[:en:Fukuoka|Fukuoka City]], [[:en:Fukuoka Prefecture|Fukuoka Prefecture]]) * {{ill|Kōshinsha|ja|庚申社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshinsha|1=Kōshin-sha (Nōgata, Fukuoka)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11486003}} ([[:en:Nōgata, Fukuoka|Nōgata]], Fukuoka Prefecture) == See Also == * [[:en:Kōshin|Kōshin belief]] * [[:en:Tsubaki Shrine|Tsuwa Hime Shrine and Naka Shrine]] * [[:en:Shirahige Shrine|Shirahige Shrine]] * {{ill|Shirabe Shrine|ja|白髭神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shirabe Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 白鬚神社 (曖昧さ回避)|1=Shirabe Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11580496}}

Such shrines are found throughout Japan, with {{ill|Tsubaki Grand Shrine|en|Tsubaki Grand Shrine|WD=Q3541617|lt=Tsubaki Grand Shrine}} in {{ill|Suzuka, Mie|en|Suzuka, Mie|WD=Q207311|lt=Suzuka, Mie}} claiming to be the "Sarutahiko Grand Shrine Headquarters."

'''Sarutahiko Shrine''' (猿田彦神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine}} dedicated to {{ill|Sarutahiko Ōkami|en|Sarutahiko Ōkami|WD=Q3090037|lt=Sarutahiko Ōkami}}, enshrined under this name. Such shrines are found throughout Japan, with {{ill|Tsubaki Grand Shrine|en|Tsubaki Grand Shrine|WD=Q3541617|lt=Tsubaki Grand Shrine}} in {{ill|Suzuka, Mie|en|Suzuka, Mie|WD=Q207311|lt=Suzuka, Mie}} claiming to be the "Sarutahiko Grand Shrine Headquarters."

Such shrines are found throughout Japan, with {{ill|Tsubaki Grand Shrine|en|Tsubaki Grand Shrine|WD=Q3541617|lt=Tsubaki Grand Shrine}} in {{ill|Suzuka, Mie|en|Suzuka, Mie|WD=Q207311|lt=Suzuka, Mie}} claiming to be the "Sarutahiko Grand Shrine Headquarters."

'''Sarutahiko Shrine''' (猿田彦神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} dedicated to {{ill|Sarutahiko Ōkami|en|Sarutahiko Ōkami|WD=Q3090037|lt=Sarutahiko Ōkami|1=Sarutahiko Ōkami}}, enshrined under this name. Such shrines are found throughout Japan, with {{ill|Tsubaki Grand Shrine|en|Tsubaki Grand Shrine|WD=Q3541617|lt=Tsubaki Grand Shrine|1=Tsubaki Grand Shrine}} in {{ill|Suzuka, Mie|en|Suzuka, Mie|WD=Q207311|lt=Suzuka, Mie|1=Suzuka, Mie}} claiming to be the "Sarutahiko Grand Shrine Headquarters."
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Kamigamimori Sarutahiko Shrine|ja|神々森猿田彦神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamigamimori Sarutahiko Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Arakawa, Tokyo|en|Arakawa, Tokyo|WD=Q232624|lt=Arakawa, Tokyo|1=Arakawa, Tokyo}}, {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|WD=Q1490|lt=Tokyo|1=Tokyo}}) * {{ill|Taidōkyō Sarutahiko Shrine|ja|太道教猿田彦神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taidōkyō Sarutahiko Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Asagaya Minami, {{ill|Suginami|en|Suginami|WD=Q232631|lt=Suginami|1=Suginami}}, Tokyo) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Suginami)|ja|猿田彦神社 (杉並区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarutahiko Shrine (Suginami)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Mototenuma, Suginami, Tokyo; an external subordinate shrine of {{ill|Mototenuma Inari Shrine|ja|本天沼稲荷神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mototenuma Inari Shrine|1=Hon-Amanuma Inari Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11520104}}) * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine (Chiyoda)|ja|猿田彦神社 (千代田区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarutahiko Shrine (Chiyoda)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Chiyoda, Tokyo;
